note: ArcGIS Online accepts OGC API – Features URLs that return GeoJSON. Use /collections/{id}/items for feature layers. ~3,000 feature limit per request; use limit or bbox to stay under.

collections.title: USGS Monitoring Locations
collections.description: USGS water monitoring station locations (name, identifier, coordinates, HUC).

collections.title: USGS Latest Continuous (Real-Time)
collections.description: Most recent continuous sensor values (real-time). Parameter codes filter to pH, conductivity, etc.

collections.title: USGS Daily Values
collections.description: Daily statistics (e.g., mean pH, conductivity) from continuous sensors.

collections.title: USGS Field Measurements
collections.description: Physical measurements from site visits (pH, conductivity, etc.).

arcgis_caveats.feature_limit: ~3,000 features per request; use limit or bbox in URL if needed.
arcgis_caveats.read_only: OGC API layers are read-only in ArcGIS Online (symbolize and query only).
arcgis_caveats.projection: Use Web Mercator for best display in web maps.
